quickstart.title: Quick Start
quickstart.description: Use VitePress-native commands for authoring, static build, and local preview.

dev.title: Development Server
dev.description: Start development server with hot reload

capabilities.title: Template Capabilities
capabilities.description: The boundaries a documentation template should demonstrate first.

markdown.title: Markdown Pages
markdown.description: Markdown files under src automatically become site routes.

frontmatter.title: Frontmatter Home
frontmatter.description: The home page declares hero, actions, and content entry through VitePress frontmatter.

i18n.title: Bilingual Content
i18n.description: Root pages are Chinese; src/en keeps the English version.

theme.title: Theme Extension
theme.description: .vitepress/theme extends the default theme and registers global components.

static.title: Static Build
static.description: Build output goes to .output and can be deployed to static hosting.

search.title: Local Search
search.description: VitePress local search is configured for Chinese and English.

structure.title: Directory Structure
structure.description: Content, config, and theme extension stay separated for a clean docs-site baseline.

config.responsibility: Site title, nav, sidebar, search, and locales.

theme.responsibility: Default theme extension, component registration, and theme-token mapping.
